heading: Insert a Single Document (insertOne())
body:
You can insert a single document using the
[collection.insertOne()](collection.insertOne) method.

The following [Atlas Function](atlas-functions) snippet inserts a single item
document into the `items` collection:

```javascript
const newItem = {
  "name": "Plastic Bricks",
  "quantity": 10,
  "category": "toys",
  "reviews": [{ "username": "legolover", "comment": "These are awesome!" }]
};

itemsCollection.insertOne(newItem)
  .then(result => console.log(`Successfully inserted item with _id: ${result.insertedId}`))
  .catch(err => console.error(`Failed to insert item: ${err}`))
```
